title: draba verna var. spathulifolia
intro: Draba verna var. spathulifolia, also known as a variety of the early winter cress or white mustard, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich content of glucosinolates, which are compounds with potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to aid digestion, treat respiratory issues, and boost the immune system, with its health benefits attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Draba verna var. spathulifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
